PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://situation.chicvill.store/api/pool" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing; $data = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "총 번들 수: $\($data.Count\)"; Write-Output "--- PersonalInfos ---"; $data | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'PersonalInfos' } | ForEach-Object { $id_val = \($_.items | Where-Object { $_.name -eq '아이디' }\).value; $role_val = \($_.items | Where-Object { $_.name -eq '권한' }\).value; $name_val = \($_.items | Where-Object { $_.name -eq '이름' }\).value; Write-Output "BundleID=$\($_.id\) | 이름=$name_val | 아이디=$id_val | 권한=$role_val | store_id=$\($_.store_id\)" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://situation.chicvill.store/api/pool" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing; $data = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $types = $data | Group-Object -Property type | Select-Object Name, Count | Sort-Object Count -Descending; $types | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://situation.chicvill.store/openapi.json" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing; $api = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $paths = $api.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name; $paths | Sort-Object | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ })
